author: jameshe5018
content:
Does anyone have thoughts on proposer_attributes event fallback? 
with proposer prefences we can more accurately update this value, but sometimes there might be cache misses, is it ok going with the 0x0 value for fee recipient and 0 gas limit when that happens ?

author: bharath.vedartham
content: the cache miss would likely happen because the node didn't see the proposer preference right?

author: jameshe5018
content: so for prysm what i'm doing is keeping the fallback for fee recipient for validators we control if it falls back

author: bharath.vedartham
content: yeah so if the builder doesn't have the proposer preferences for the validator then their bid will anyways get rejected at gossip since they may not match the fields in the preferences while building the bid. I think returning the default fee recipient and the default target gas limit for that node makes sense

author: jameshe5018
content: ok instead of 0x00 i'll return the default then need to update my pr

author: jameshe5018
content: I opened https://github.com/ethereum/beacon-APIs/pull/608 <@1386598056320831509> <@586161934425128960> cc ( when you're back)
